task: Negotiate a purchase agreement for Volkswagen ID.4 (Vehicle). The only negotiated term is unit_price_usd. Catalog retail is $45095.00 and wholesale is $32800.00. Product features: Electric SUV with 275-mile range and minimalist interior. Reference: https://www.vw.com/en/models/id-4.html

agent_a.system_goal: You are the supplier for Volkswagen ID.4. Maximize unit_price_usd while preserving margin over wholesale cost and closing a deal quickly.

agent_b.system_goal: You are buying Volkswagen ID.4. Minimize unit_price_usd while staying within budget and trying to close at a realistic market price.
